description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The back is a smooth, metallic or glass surface with a prominent Apple logo centered in the upper half, and two camera lenses with a flash arranged vertically in the top left corner. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power, and a thin profile. The front display shows a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with concentric circles in shades of red and pink, and a black notch at the top housing the front camera and sensors. The overall design is minimalist and premium, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines. The object is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo on a smooth metallic back. The device features a minimalist, premium design with flat sides and a vibrant display.
description_view_0: The back view shows a smooth metallic surface with a centered Apple logo and two camera lenses with a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the slim profile of the phone and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large glass touchscreen with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a black notch at the top.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the thinness of the device and the absence of visible buttons on this side.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the metallic surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant abstract wallpaper with concentric circles in shades of red and pink, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back of the device, slightly raised from the surface.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume control, and a single button on the right edge, likely the power button. All buttons are slim and rectangular.
